caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green embroidered top and a dark beaded necklace, speaks against a solid black background. Throughout the sequence, she is positioned centrally, gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. She initially has her mouth open while speaking, then closes it briefly with a slight smile, before closing her eyes and speaking again. In the final segment, she opens her eyes and continues talking, raising her left hand with her fingers slightly spread. A small circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" appears in the bottom left corner of the scene. The background remains static and dark, focusing all attention on the woman's facial expressions and hand movements as she delivers her presentation.
